subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Hope and my Refuge, my Shelter and my Shield, my Dwelling-place and my Protector! I press my brow to the sacred dust of Thy threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و ملجای و ملاذی و مهربی و معاذی انی اعفر جبینی بتراب عتبتک المقدسه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort
